title: Dynamic Agent Registry — Single Source of Truth
description: Remove hardcoded agent lists from UI, game, and scanner by creating a canonical agent-registry.json that all consumers read from.

dod.criterion: .claude/agent-registry.json exists and is valid JSON parseable by jq
Registry contains entries for all 10 named agents + CEO + devon
4 game agents (sarah, morgan, marcus, priya) have game field with palette, seatId, position, color
Teams array with 4 team definitions present

tasks.title: Wire React UI, game, session cards, and server scanner to agent-registry.json

dod.criterion: agent-config.ts derives all data from agent-registry.json — no hardcoded agent literals
session-scanner.ts KNOWN_AGENTS built from agent-registry.json at module load
game/types.ts OFFICE_AGENTS and AGENT_CHAR_MAP derived from registry
Session card badge colors (KanbanCard, SessionCard, SessionTree) use shared registry-derived functions
npm run type-check passes with zero errors
Existing TypeScript interfaces (AgentConfig, TeamConfig, AgentDesk) still satisfied

tasks.title: Wire validate-cast.sh and CLI init to agent-registry.json

dod.criterion: validate-cast.sh reads CSUITE and AGENT_FILES from agent-registry.json via jq
validate-cast.sh exits gracefully if agent-registry.json not found
